name: Pasta with Mexican Turkey Picadillo Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Tomato paste, mixed with 1/4 cup water
1/2 lb Angel hair pasta, fideos OR Vermicelli or spaghettini
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add jalapeno peppers and garlic; sauté for about 1/2 minute.
2. Stir in the turkey picadillo and tomato sauce (or puree or paste with water). Simmer for 4 to 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until heated through and thickened. If the sauce is too thick, add a few tablespoons of water.
3. Taste and adjust seasonings with salt as needed.
4. In a large pot of boiling salted water, cook pasta until just tender (al dente). Drain well.
5. Transfer pasta to a serving bowl. Toss with 1 tablespoon oil if desired. Stir in the chopped green onions and half the sauce.
6. Spoon remaining sauce over the pasta, sprinkle with additional green onions, and serve. Makes 4 main-course servings.
